title: Fix identity tests, remove hash_key(), run full cargo test
description:
Clean up after the encoding change: fix the pub_id_is_hash_not_key test, remove dead hash_key(), verify all tests pass.

What: Test fixes and dead code removal; final cargo test validation.

Algorithm:
1. In core/src/identity.rs, find test pub_id_is_hash_not_key():
   a. Remove assert_eq!(pub_id.0.len(), 64)
   b. Remove assert!(pub_id.0.chars().all(|c| c.is_ascii_hexdigit()))
   c. Add assert!(pub_id.0.starts_with("did:key:z"), "pub_id must have did:key format: {}", pub_id.0)
   d. Add assert!(validate_did_key(&pub_id.0).is_ok())
   e. Remove the hash_key() recomputation block (it verified hex match — no longer valid)
   f. Rename test to pub_id_has_did_key_format if that better describes what it checks
2. Remove fn hash_key() from identity.rs (no callers after W1A)
3. Remove fn hash_key() from auth.rs if it exists there as a copy
4. Run: cargo test -p agora-core 2>&1
5. Run: cargo test -p agora-relay 2>&1
6. Run: cargo test -p agora-cli 2>&1
7. Run: cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings 2>&1
8. Run: cargo fmt --workspace -- --check 2>&1
9. Report pass/fail for each command

Defensive programming:
- Do not modify tests to make them pass by weakening assertions — only change the expected VALUE (hex format → did:key format)
- If cargo test fails for any crate after expected test fixes, report the failure; do not work around it

Agent team: standard (R + I + T where T verifies the full suite)

Tests:
- All existing tests in agora-core must pass
- All existing tests in agora-relay must pass
- All existing tests in agora-cli must pass
- No clippy warnings
- cargo fmt --check passes
acceptance_criteria: cargo test --workspace exits 0; cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings exits 0; cargo fmt --workspace -- --check exits 0; grep -rn 'hash_key' core/src/ returns 0 lines (function fully removed)
